changeSet.author: angshu, pratiti

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA' AND is_set = 1

changeSet.comment: mark immunization concept as a set (984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA)
changeSet.sql: UPDATE concept SET is_set = 1 WHERE uuid = '984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA';

changeSet.author: angshu, pratiti

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM concept WHERE uuid = '984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA'

changeSet.comment: add answers as set members for immunization (984AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA)
